criteria.label: Build an Express scatter with color, hover_data, and tuned marker opacity.
criteria.example: px.scatter(df, x='feat_a', y='feat_b', color='label', hover_data=['id']); fig.update_traces(marker=dict(size=8, opacity=0.7)).

criteria.label: Plot train and validation loss with Graph Objects and unified epoch hover.
criteria.example: Two go.Scatter traces on shared epochs; fig.update_layout(xaxis_title='Epoch', yaxis_title='Loss', hovermode='x unified').

criteria.label: Create a two-row make_subplots figure for loss and accuracy with shared_xaxes.
criteria.example: make_subplots(rows=2, cols=1, shared_xaxes=True); add train/val traces to row 1 and row 2; update_layout(height=600).

criteria.label: Add custom hover metadata with customdata and hovertemplate on a GO scatter.
Explain scope: what Plotly owns vs Matplotlib, Seaborn, and embedding visualization.
criteria.example: State that Express/GO, hover, and HTML/Dash patterns are here; Matplotlib owns static savefig; Seaborn owns statistical defaults on Matplotlib; embedding viz owns coordinate interpretation.
